name: Vitamin B12
summary: Vitamin B12 is normalized for hemodialysis micronucleus-frequency evidence as a genome-stability adjunct with folate.
mechanism_summary: Supports one-carbon metabolism and DNA synthesis/repair context, with linked public evidence in a disease-specific supplementation study.

open_questions: Whether the linked evidence generalizes beyond the specific population, model, tissue, or disease context already recorded in the public finding. Linked context: Folic acid and vitamin B12 micronucleus study in hemodialysis patients; Folic acid and vitamin B12 reduced micronucleus frequency in hemodialysis patients.
Whether mechanism-specific effects can be separated from combination, product, delivery, or study-design confounding.
Whether future studies can connect the observed biomarker, functional, or model-organism signal to durable aging-relevant outcomes.
